Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $113,376,590Details
International Box Office $86,564,410
Worldwide Box Office $199,941,000
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,984,378
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,881,678
Total $10,866,056
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Spengler family returns to where it all started—the iconic New York City firehouse—to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who’ve developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$45,004,673 (39.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.52 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,345 opening theaters/4,345 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $119,892,482

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 22nd, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
March 22nd, 2024 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: March 20th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
March 21st, 2024 (Wide), released as Ghostbusters: Apocalipsis Fantasma (Mexico)
March 21st, 2024 (Wide), released as Caça-Fantasmas: O Império do Gelo (Portugal)
March 21st, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 21st, 2024 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: May 7th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for supernatural action/violence, language and suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2823 (cert #54872), 2/28/2024)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: Ghostbusters
Filming location (city or town): New York, NY

Synopsis

The Spengler family returns to where it all started—the iconic New York City firehouse—to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who’ve developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.
